name: Saranga Rasingolla
quote: You don't just teach Zumba. You teach confidence, self-love, and the joy of movement. Every class is a celebration of life, and I leave feeling empowered and uplifted.

name: Rosi
quote: The perfect combination of fitness and fun. Every class is well-organized, motivating, and full of positive vibes. I've improved my fitness while making great friends.

name: Aisha L.
quote: I brought my 60-year-old mum to Zumba Gold and she's completely obsessed. Sofia adapts the class so everyone feels included. Genuinely the highlight of our week.
